name: Contineum Therapeutics, Inc.
summary: PART I . Overview We are a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company pioneering differentiated therapies for the treatment of NI&I indications with significant unmet need. We target biological pathways associated with specific clinical impairments that we believe, once modulated, will demonstrably alter the course of disease. We focus on developing selective compounds targeting challenging molecular pathways and have built a portfolio of small molecule drug candidates. We believe our two clinical...
